docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,660.36 FILED BY CHEN, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, LEAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUNG, KEVIN $3,660.36 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,675.36, CLERK TRANSLATED IN CHINESE. DEF ADMITTED HE OWED THE MONEY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
